modules.role: Expose searchable memory or document retrieval without changing the core runtime contract.
modules.activation_surface: Optional compose profile and dashboard card once implemented.
guardrails: Must declare storage ownership and backup semantics.
Must not appear in the dashboard until the service is real.

modules.role: Provide vector indexing as a dedicated module rather than smuggling it into unrelated services.
modules.activation_surface: Separate optional profile with explicit data path ownership.
guardrails: Must define restore path before being considered supported.
Must document memory and storage expectations.

modules.role: Add logs and metrics collection when the stack needs it, without pretending the current repo already has observability.
modules.activation_surface: New optional profile plus generated dashboard section.
guardrails: Must stay optional and justified by actual operating needs.
Must not replace the current lightweight doctor and smoke checks unless it is demonstrably better.

modules.role: Add extra coding helpers beyond Aider without coupling them to the UI module.
guardrails: Must preserve the on-demand nature of the coding module unless a persistent daemon is justified.
Must document how credentials flow through LiteLLM.

modules.role: Introduce browser automation as an explicit module rather than implying it from the dashboard.
modules.activation_surface: Optional integration profile and dedicated docs section.
guardrails: Must state whether it is host-managed or compose-managed.
Must define security boundaries and supported execution path.
